title: Tao Te Ching 29
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 29 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 29 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The world is a sacred vessel. It cannot be improved. If you try to change it, you will ruin it.
